whois.title: WHOIS Lookup
whois.subtitle: Query domain names, IP addresses, and autonomous system numbers.
whois.query_label: Query — domain, IP address, or ASN
whois.error_empty: Enter a domain, IP address, or ASN number.
whois.error_failed: WHOIS lookup failed — please try again.

about.who_uses_sysadmins_desc: investigate IP ownership, routing, and registrar details quickly.
about.who_uses_security_desc: gather reconnaissance data on domains and infrastructure.
about.who_uses_investors_desc: check registration and expiry dates before acquisition.
about.who_uses_developers_desc: integrate WHOIS data into scripts and applications via the REST API.
about.feature_domain_desc: Registrar, registrant, name servers, creation date, expiry, and status for any registered domain.
about.feature_ip_desc: Network block ownership, CIDR notation, RIR assignment data for IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.
about.feature_asn_desc: Autonomous system name, description, and routing policy for any AS number.
about.feature_formats_desc: JSON, XML, and plain text — all via content negotiation or a ?format= parameter.
about.feature_caching_desc: In-memory cache with per-type TTLs: 24 h for domains, 7 days for IPs and ASNs.
about.feature_ratelimit_desc: 60 requests/minute for anonymous callers; higher limits for authenticated API tokens.
about.tech_go_desc: single static binary, zero runtime dependencies, CGO disabled.
about.tech_sqlite_desc: embedded database for caching metadata and audit logs.
about.tech_scheduler_desc: GeoIP updates, token cleanup, log rotation, and backups — no external cron required.
about.tech_docker_desc: multi-arch images for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
about.tech_license_desc: free for any use, commercial or otherwise.

docs.meta_description_suffix: REST API documentation — endpoints, authentication, and response formats.
docs.subtitle: RESTful WHOIS API — all endpoints are free, rate-limited, and require no account.
docs.base_url_desc_prefix: All API endpoints are versioned and prefixed with
docs.auth_desc1: Most endpoints are public and require no authentication. Bulk lookups and server operations require a server token passed as a bearer header.
docs.auth_desc2_prefix: The server token is auto-generated on first run and written to
docs.auth_desc2_suffix: No user accounts or sessions are involved.
docs.formats_desc: Format is determined by the Accept header or the ?format= query parameter. JSON is the default.
docs.endpoint_healthz_desc: Health check. Returns service status, version, uptime, and feature flags. No auth required.
docs.endpoint_whois_desc: Generic WHOIS lookup — auto-detects query type (domain, IPv4, IPv6, or ASN).
docs.endpoint_domain_desc: Domain-specific WHOIS lookup. Returns registrar, registrant, name servers, dates, and status.
docs.endpoint_ip_desc: IP address WHOIS lookup. Accepts IPv4 and IPv6.
docs.endpoint_asn_desc: ASN WHOIS lookup. Use the AS prefix.
docs.endpoint_validate_desc: Validate a query without performing the lookup. Returns detected type and validity.
docs.endpoint_bulk_desc: Bulk WHOIS lookup — up to 100 queries in a single request. Requires server token.
docs.endpoint_servers_desc: List all configured WHOIS servers by TLD and IP range.
docs.endpoint_stats_desc: Service statistics — total queries, cache hit rate, uptime, and per-type breakdown.
docs.rate_limit_note: Rate-limited responses use HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.
docs.error_rate_limited_meaning: Too many requests — back off and retry.
docs.error_server_error_meaning: Internal error — WHOIS server unreachable or unexpected failure.
